description.value:
Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed].

Requirements You have a fully grown tail.

You disconnect and drop part of your tail to escape. You cease being grabbed then Step. It takes 1 day (or an effect like @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Regenerate]) for your tail to fully grow back. Until it does, you can't use your tail, and you take a –2 circumstance penalty on checks to [[/act balance]].

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Ancestral Unarmed Attack] (tail), you can eject your tail as a reaction when you take damage from an attack. If you do, you Step and one adjacent square becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute as your tail wriggles in place. If you also have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Feign Death] skill feat, you can Feign Death instead of Stepping, with a +2 circumstance bonus to your Deception DC.
